title: Exotic Canadian Salmon Poke
description: A yeasty and juicy Canadian dish featuring sashimi-cut salmon, cocoa, and ayurvedic-rajasic-friendly ingredients, served in an earthenware bowl
instructions: In a small bowl, whisk together soy sauce, sesame oil, and yeast extract.
In a separate bowl, mix together grated ginger and sesame seeds.
Add the cocoa nibs to the ginger mixture and stir to combine.
In a large earthenware bowl, combine the sashimi-grade salmon, soy sauce mixture, and ginger mixture.
Toss gently to coat the salmon with the marinade.
Sprinkle the green onions and sesame seeds over the top of the salmon.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve the salmon poke chilled, garnished with additional green onions if desired.
